// Fix for miscompilation with ctpop range metadata
#include "InstCombineInternal.h"
#include "llvm/IR/IntrinsicInst.h"
#include "llvm/IR/PatternMatch.h"

using namespace llvm;
using namespace PatternMatch;

Instruction *llvm::InstCombiner::visitSelectInst(SelectInst &SI) {
  // Prevent unsafe optimization of select instructions involving ctpop with range metadata
  // that excludes 0, as this can introduce poison where the original code would not.
  
  Value *Cond = SI.getCondition();
  Value *TrueVal = SI.getTrueValue();
  Value *FalseVal = SI.getFalseValue();
  
  // Check if this matches the problematic pattern
  if (match(TrueVal, m_One())) {
    if (ICmpInst *CondCmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(Cond)) {
      if (CondCmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ) {
        Value *X = CondCmp->getOperand(0);
        if (match(CondCmp->getOperand(1), m_Zero())) {
          if (ICmpInst *FalseCmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(FalseVal)) {
            if (FalseCmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ) {
              if (IntrinsicInst *II = dyn_cast<IntrinsicInst>(FalseCmp->getOperand(0))) {
                if (II->getIntrinsicID() == Intrinsic::ctpop && II->getOperand(0) == X) {
                  if (match(FalseCmp->getOperand(1), m_One())) {
                    // Check for range metadata excluding 0
                    if (MDNode *Range = II->getMetadata(LLVMContext::MD_range)) {
                      if (Range->getNumOperands() >= 2) {
                        if (ConstantInt *Low = mdconst::extract<ConstantInt>(Range->getOperand(0))) {
                          if (Low->getZExtValue() > 0) {
                            return nullptr; // Skip optimization to avoid poison
                          }
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return nullptr;
}

// Fix for miscompilation with ctpop range metadata and icmp samesign equality tests
#include "InstCombineInternal.h"
#include "llvm/IR/IntrinsicInst.h"
#include "llvm/IR/PatternMatch.h"

using namespace llvm;
using namespace PatternMatch;

Instruction *llvm::InstCombiner::visitSelectInst(SelectInst &SI) {
  // Prevent unsafe optimization of select instructions involving ctpop with range metadata
  // that excludes 0, as this can introduce poison where the original code would not.
  
  Value *Cond = SI.getCondition();
  Value *TrueVal = SI.getTrueValue();
  Value *FalseVal = SI.getFalseValue();
  
  // Check if this matches the problematic pattern
  if (match(TrueVal, m_One())) {
    if (ICmpInst *CondCmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(Cond)) {
      if (CondCmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ) {
        Value *X = CondCmp->getOperand(0);
        if (match(CondCmp->getOperand(1), m_Zero())) {
          if (ICmpInst *FalseCmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(FalseVal)) {
            if (FalseCmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ) {
              if (IntrinsicInst *II = dyn_cast<IntrinsicInst>(FalseCmp->getOperand(0))) {
                if (II->getIntrinsicID() == Intrinsic::ctpop && II->getOperand(0) == X) {
                  if (match(FalseCmp->getOperand(1), m_One())) {
                    // Check for range metadata excluding 0
                    if (MDNode *Range = II->getMetadata(LLVMContext::MD_range)) {
                      if (Range->getNumOperands() >= 2) {
                        if (ConstantInt *Low = mdconst::extract<ConstantInt>(Range->getOperand(0))) {
                          if (Low->getZExtValue() > 0) {
                            return nullptr; // Skip optimization to avoid poison
                          }
                        }
                      }
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Handle the icmp samesign equality test pattern to prevent miscompilation
  // Pattern: select i1 %XeqC, i1 %YeqC, i1 %and
  // where %XeqC = icmp eq %X, C, %YeqC = icmp eq %Y, C, 
  // and %and = select i1 (not %YeqC), i1 %XeqY, i1 false
  // and %XeqY = icmp samesign eq %X, %Y
  if (ICmpInst *OuterCond = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(Cond)) {
    if (OuterCond->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ) {
      Value *X = OuterCond->getOperand(0);
      ConstantInt *ConstC = dyn_cast<ConstantInt>(OuterCond->getOperand(1));
      if (ConstC && isa<ICmpInst>(TrueVal)) {
        ICmpInst *YeqC = cast<ICmpInst>(TrueVal);
        if (YeqC->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ && 
            YeqC->getOperand(1) == ConstC) {
          Value *Y = YeqC->getOperand(0);
          
          // Check if FalseVal matches the 'and' pattern
          if (SelectInst *AndSelect = dyn_cast<SelectInst>(FalseVal)) {
            Value *NotYeqC = AndSelect->getCondition();
            Value *XeqY = AndSelect->getTrueValue();
            Value *FalseConst = AndSelect->getFalseValue();
            
            if (match(FalseConst, m_Zero()) && isa<ICmpInst>(XeqY)) {
              ICmpInst *SamesignCmp = cast<ICmpInst>(XeqY);
              if (SamesignCmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ &&
                  SamesignCmp->isEquality() && 
                  SamesignCmp->getOperand(0) == X && 
                  SamesignCmp->getOperand(1) == Y) {
                
                // Check if NotYeqC is (xor %YeqC, true)
                if (BinaryOperator *Xor = dyn_cast<BinaryOperator>(NotYeqC)) {
                  if (Xor->getOpcode() == Instruction::Xor && 
                      Xor->getOperand(0) == YeqC && 
                      match(Xor->getOperand(1), m_One())) {
                    
                    // This is the problematic pattern that can introduce poison
                    // We should not optimize this away to just the samesign comparison
                    // because it loses the special handling for the constant case
                    return nullptr;
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return nullptr;
}

using namespace llvm;
using namespace PatternMatch;

Instruction *llvm::InstCombiner::visitSelectInst(SelectInst &SI) {
  Value *Cond = SI.getCondition();
  Value *TrueVal = SI.getTrueValue();
  Value *FalseVal = SI.getFalseValue();
  
  // Prevent miscompilation of icmp equality test with constant samesign pattern
  if (ICmpInst *CondICmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(Cond)) {
    if (CondICmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ) {
      ConstantInt *Const = dyn_cast<ConstantInt>(CondICmp->getOperand(1));
      if (Const && Const->isNegative()) {
        if (ICmpInst *TrueICmp = dyn_cast<ICmpInst>(TrueVal)) {
          if (TrueICmp->getPredicate() == ICmpInst::ICMP_EQ && 
              TrueICmp->getOperand(1) == Const) {
            // Found the problematic pattern, don't optimize
            return nullptr;
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  return nullptr;
}
